sections.name: Hero
sections.copy: Welcome to Fajibs Cakez Edible Solutions Limited – pioneering the future of food technology in Nigeria. From artisanal baked goods to cutting-edge poultry solutions, we combine traditional craftsmanship with modern innovation to deliver exceptional edible products and foodservice technology solutions across Abia State and beyond.
sections.imagePrompt: A vibrant, modern Nigerian food production facility with gleaming stainless steel equipment, fresh baked goods on cooling racks in the foreground, and happy staff in pristine white uniforms working with advanced food technology equipment. Warm golden lighting, professional photography, showcasing both traditional Nigerian baking and modern tech integration. High resolution, photorealistic.

sections.name: About Us
sections.copy:
Fajibs Cakez Edible Solutions Limited (also trading as Fajibs Cakez Foodservice Tech Co) represents the convergence of culinary excellence and technological innovation. Founded and managed by an experienced Poultry Tech Manager, we understand the intricate balance between food safety, quality production, and scalable technology solutions.

Our facility in Umuahia North serves as the hub for our diverse operations – from creating delectable cakes and pastries that grace celebrations across Abia State, to providing comprehensive poultry technology management and foodservice solutions for businesses looking to modernize their operations.

We don't just follow food trends; we create them. Our commitment to innovation means constantly exploring new techniques, ingredients, and technologies that enhance food production, preservation, and delivery. Whether you're a customer seeking premium baked goods or a business partner looking for foodtech solutions, Fajibs Cakez delivers excellence at every touchpoint.
sections.imagePrompt: A split composition showing dual aspects of the business: on one side, an elegant multi-tiered celebration cake with Nigerian-inspired decorations and fresh fruits; on the other side, modern poultry farm technology with automated feeding systems and monitoring equipment. Both sides connected by warm, professional lighting. Shot in Umuahia, Nigeria setting with local architectural elements visible in background. Photorealistic, editorial quality.

sections.name: Our Solutions
sections.copy:
**Artisanal Bakery Services**
Custom celebration cakes, wedding cakes, birthday cakes, corporate event pastries, cupcakes, and specialty desserts crafted with premium ingredients and creative designs that tell your story.

**Poultry Technology Management**
Comprehensive poultry farm setup, management consulting, automated feeding systems, health monitoring solutions, and production optimization for commercial poultry operations.

**Foodservice Technology Solutions**
Restaurant kitchen optimization, food safety systems, inventory management technology, cold chain solutions, and digital ordering platforms for food businesses.

**Product Development & Consulting**
Custom recipe development, food product formulation, shelf-life optimization, packaging solutions, and market entry strategies for food entrepreneurs.

**Bulk & Wholesale Supply**
Commercial bakery supplies, ingredients sourcing, bulk poultry products, and B2B foodservice provisions for restaurants, hotels, and event centers across Abia State.
sections.imagePrompt: A modern grid layout of five distinct service areas: a beautifully decorated Nigerian celebration cake with intricate fondant work, automated poultry farm with chickens and technology equipment, a sleek restaurant kitchen with digital displays, food scientists in a lab developing products, and wholesale food supplies in organized storage. Each section vibrant, professional, and distinctly Nigerian in character. Photorealistic, bright natural lighting.

sections.name: Get In Touch
sections.copy:
Ready to experience the Fajibs Cakez difference? Whether you need a show-stopping cake for your next celebration, want to upgrade your poultry operations, or seek innovative foodservice technology solutions, we're here to help.

**Visit Our Facility:**
Apostle Christian Amajuoyi's compound, Orie Ugwu Afaraukwu Ibeku, Umuahia North, Abia State, Nigeria

**Call or WhatsApp:**
+234 806 259 3303

**Business Hours:**
Monday – Friday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
Saturday: 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM
Sunday: By Appointment Only

For custom cake orders, please contact us at least 72 hours in advance. For poultry tech consultations and foodservice solutions, schedule a free initial assessment by calling or messaging us on WhatsApp.
sections.imagePrompt: A welcoming Nigerian business storefront in Umuahia with the Fajibs Cakez signage, showing a clean modern facade, potted plants at the entrance, friendly staff member waving at camera, and a glimpse of the interior showing both a bakery display case and professional equipment. Bright daylight, inviting atmosphere, photorealistic. Include subtle Nigerian architectural elements and local landscape.

contact.address: Apostle Christian Amajuoyi's compound, Orie Ugwu Afaraukwu Ibeku, Umuahia North, Abia State, Nigeria
